{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Vallenar Corporation motto
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Vallenar Corporation motto]] is '[[Vallenar]] - Everything. For everyone.'<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
